title: CAMPS - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY FAMILY YMCA CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of day, travel and overnight youth camps. 522 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Ages 5-15 for most activities. Must have completed kindergarten. Hours: Day Camp: Late June-Late August, Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Travel and Overnight Camp: Varies; visit website for camp dates Email (541) 772-6295 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 772-6295 Main phone Main phone (541) 772-6295 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information; select register now button to view and register for camps FEES: Varies by camp; scholarships available DOCUMENTS: Health Form, Medication Authorization Form Income verification if applying for a scholarship AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of W 6th and Main Streets. Bus routes 2, 25, and 30. Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE VALLEY FAMILY YMCA
